mechanics.name_guess: New national currencies arose in its place, generically
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 181 > factions > New national currencies arose in its place, generically
mechanics.excerpt: New national currencies arose in its place, generically called House bills (H-bills): today: these monies account for almost 90 percent of the currency used in the Inner Sphere_ The rest are ComStar bills (C-bills) planetary scrip (worthless anywhere except the planet on which was ssued). In the Draconis Combine the upper crust receives stellar education perhaps the best the Inner Sphere.
